title: VT villager variations for Fresh Animations
description: Makes the Vanilla Tweaks villager variations recourcepack work for FA!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf5a2a20c929f86d601759d53c0c5be6c664f7bd.png)

![Optifine OR ETF & EMF required](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d8870d54f20031d68cba154311be2bf59a329a5.png)


<center> Makes the Vanilla Tweaks villager variations recourcepack work for Fresh Animations! </center>


‎ ‎ 


<hr style="border:2px solid gray">

‎ 
‎ 

Original recourcepacks!:
 
-  **[**VanillaTweaks**](https://vanillatweaks.net/)**
-  [**Fresh Animations**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

## Order of recourcepacks
Place [this pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vt-villagervariations-for-freshanimations) _above_ [**Fresh Animations**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

> Having this pack + FA is only needed, having the original VT pack is not required.
